news.news: WuXi Biologics received GMP certification from the South Korea Ministry of Food and Drug Safety (MFDS) for three facilities, enabling commercial manufacturing of a bispecific antibody therapeutic for biliary tract cancer.

Roche announced the launch of an NVIDIA AI factory to accelerate the development of new therapeutics and diagnostics, leveraging advanced computational infrastructure to support its pipeline which includes gene-editing and other novel modalities.

Insilico Medicine nominated ISM0387, its first UAE-based preclinical candidate and 30th AI-supported preclinical candidate overall, utilizing generative AI to design a novel PRMT5 inhibitor for glioblastoma.
